title: rhinanthus aristatus subvar. vollmannii
intro: Rhinanthus aristatus subvar. vollmannii, also known as Vollmann's broomrape, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the broomrape family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to its high concentration of bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. Vollmann's broomrape has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
